appmesh.gatewayroute.grpcgatewayroute.Cf: An object that represents a gRPC gateway route.

appmesh.gatewayroute.grpcgatewayroute.Ac.Description: An object that represents the action to take if a match is determined.

appmesh.gatewayroute.grpcgatewayroute.Ma.Description: An object that represents the criteria for determining a request match.
